title: ulmus glabra f. elliptica
intro: Ulmus glabra f. elliptica, also known as the English elm or elliptical-leaved elm, is a variant of the wych elm tree, characterized by its elliptical leaves and distinctive growth habit. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ulmus glabra f. elliptica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable herb in herbal medicine. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
